description_long: This object consists of a group of six personal care lotion containers, each with a distinct shape and size, arranged in a row. The containers include cylindrical bottles, tubes, and a pump dispenser, with some featuring blue accents and others in plain white or silver. The pump bottle has a metallic sheen and a black pump top, while the tubes have flat caps and are slightly tapered. The blue containers have printed text and graphics, while the white and silver ones are more minimalist. The materials appear to be mostly plastic with some metallic elements, and the surfaces are smooth and glossy. These containers are typical of those found in urban environments such as public restrooms, gyms, or personal care shops.
description: A group of six lotion containers in various shapes, including tubes, bottles, and a pump dispenser, with white, blue, and metallic finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six containers side by side, highlighting their different shapes, sizes, and color accents.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profiles of the containers, with the pump dispenser and tube caps visible at the ends.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the containers, with less visible branding and more focus on the container shapes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profiles and the arrangement of the containers from the other side.
